title: Economist — first reading of the scoreboard

condition.description: Run your first economy read: ./execute.sh status (the engine's scoreboard verb — every Cybernet's persona, fitness_score, total_tokens_consumed, accumulated_cost, ranked by fitness). The economy fields live ON the Cybernet nodes in the graph; the verb is a thin wrapper over the live API, so the event and its check are the same call. Earned once per agent, on the agent's first status read of a season.

body.query: MATCH (c:Cybernet) RETURN c.name AS name, c.persona AS persona, c.fitness_score AS fitness_score, c.total_tokens_consumed AS total_tokens_consumed, c.accumulated_cost AS accumulated_cost ORDER BY coalesce(c.fitness_score, -1) DESC, name

check.earned_when: the scoreboard renders (non-empty array of Cybernets with the three economy fields present as keys — null values count; a null is a truthful economic fact about an uncalibrated newborn). Record the earning by appending to earned_by with the timestamp of the agent's first read.
check.verified_against_live_api: 2026-06-12 — ./execute.sh status executed end to end (11 shells on the board, JaniScribe leading at 5360 tokens / 0.0804 accumulated_cost); builder verification runs do not earn
